Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.desc: Go to bars and buy alcohol.
Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.name: Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl
Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.start: Speak to the barbarian guard at the entrance of the Barbarian Agility Training Course.
Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.items: *208 coins to buy all the required alcohol

Animal Magnetism.requirements: *Completion of the following quests:n**The Restless Ghostn**Ernest the Chickenn**Priest in Periln*File:Slayer icon.png|link=Slayer|alt=Slayer 18 Slayer (not boostable) (required to start)n*File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting 19 Crafting (not boostable) (required to start)n*File:Ranged icon.png|link=Ranged|alt=Ranged 30 Ranged (not boostable) (required to start)n*File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting 35 Woodcutting (not boostable) (required to start)
Animal Magnetism.desc: Draynor Manor has a new resident and, adventurers rejoice, she is a damsel in distress. Far from being Sleeping Beauty, she finds the Manor's beds not to her liking and is suffering from insomniac nights. If you fancy yourself able to aid Ava in her search for a good night's sleep, who knows what the budding scientist will produce as a reward?
Animal Magnetism.name: Animal Magnetism
Animal Magnetism.start: Speak to Ava in Draynor Manor.
Animal Magnetism.ironman: *Mithril axe (File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing 51 Smithing (boostable)); File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving 28 Thieving (boostable) for the Chest (Isle of Souls Dungeon)|Isle of Souls dungeon chest; File:Woodcutting icon.png|link=Woodcutting|alt=Woodcutting 60 Woodcutting (boostable) to purchase axe from Perry's Chop-chop Shop in the Woodcutting Guild; access to fairy rings (BKQ) and killing tree spirits, blue dragons, or king sand crabs)n*Holy symbol (File:Prayer icon.png|link=Prayer|alt=Prayer 31 Prayer (not boostable))
Animal Magnetism.items: *Mithril axe (required to obtain the blessed axe; no other type of axe will do)n*5 iron barsn*Ghostspeak amulet (Morytania legs will not work)n*20 ecto-tokens (or 4 bones, 4 buckets and 4 pots to gain the tokens)n*Hammern*Hard leathern*Holy symboln*Polished buttons

Another Slice of H.A.M..requirements: *File:Attack icon.png|link=Attack|alt=Attack 15 Attack (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Prayer icon.png|link=Prayer|alt=Prayer 25 Prayer (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*Completion of the following quests:n**Death to the Dorgeshuunn***The Lost Triben****Goblin Diplomacyn****Rune Mysteriesn**The Giant Dwarfn**The Dig Siten*The ability to defeat a level 64 (using any combat style) and two level 30 enemies using either Ranged or Magic.
Another Slice of H.A.M..desc: The dwarves are building a new underground rail link between their city of Keldagrim and the cave goblins' Dorgesh-Kaan, but work is being held up by the discovery of ancient goblin artefacts, and they need the help of a qualified archaeologist. Helping them out should be simple enough - unless you stumble upon another H.A.M. plot against the city.
Another Slice of H.A.M..name: Another Slice of H.A.M.
Another Slice of H.A.M..start: Go to Ur-tag's house in Dorgesh-Kaan. (Can be reached either via Kazgar from the Lumbridge cellar or via Dartog from the water mill by telling either NPC to take the player to the mines. Afterwards, go south past the sword icon and enter the door.)
Another Slice of H.A.M..items: *A light sourcen*A tinderboxn*Magic or Ranged equipment|gear for enemy fight (cannot use Melee on them)

Architectural Alliance.requirements: Various skills depending on the favour activities donen*File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining 42 Mining for any Lovakengj activity
Architectural Alliance.desc: Prove yourself to the five houses of Great Kourend and gain the support of several architects to rebuild the statue of King Rada I.
Architectural Alliance.name: Architectural Alliance
Architectural Alliance.start: Speak to Hosa by the Statue (King Rada I)|statue outside Kourend Castle.
Architectural Alliance.items: Various items depending on the favour activities done

The Ascent of Arceuus.requirements: *Completion of the following quests:n**Client of Kourendn***X Marks the Spotn*File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter 12 Hunter (not boostable) (required to start)
The Ascent of Arceuus.desc: A long time ago, the citizens of Arceuus house gave up their human bodies and claimed immortality. This event was known as the Ascent of Arceuus and it marked the end of death within Arceuus house. Or so they believed. For the first time in a thousand years, a member of Arceuus house has fallen. You will need to solve the mystery of this death. However, time is of the essence and the fate of Arceuus house lies in your hands.
The Ascent of Arceuus.name: The Ascent of Arceuus

At First Light.requirements: *File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter 46 Hunter (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore 30 Herblore (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Construction icon.png|link=Construction|alt=Construction 27 Construction (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*Completion of the following quests:n**Children of the Sunn**Eagles' Peak
At First Light.desc: Learn about the role of the Hunter Guild and unlock higher tier rumours.
At First Light.name: At First Light
At First Light.start: Speak to Guildmaster Apatura at the Hunter Guild.
At First Light.items: *Needle or costume needle (one needle spawns in Pellem's Fur Store nearby)n*Box trap (can be bought from Imia's Supplies nearby)n*Hammer (obtainable during quest)n*2 jerboa tails (obtainable during quest)

Barbarian Training.requirements: *Completion of Tai Bwo Wannai Trio (not required to start)n*File:Fishing icon.png|link=Fishing|alt=Fishing 55 Fishing (boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Firemaking icon.png|link=Firemaking|alt=Firemaking 35 Firemaking (not boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Strength icon.png|link=Strength|alt=Strength 35 Strength (not boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility 15 Agility (not boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Farming icon.png|link=Farming|alt=Farming 15 Farming (not boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting 11 Crafting (not boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing 5 Smithing (not boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore 4 Herblore (not boostable) (not required to start)
Barbarian Training.desc: Otto Godblessed has been researching his history and training people in the ways of his ancestors, and now he's ready to teach you. From his hut on the banks of the lake at the top of Baxtorian Falls, you'll go Fishing with your bare hands, mix fish eggs into your potions, wield one-handed spears and, finally, go deep into the ancient cavern beneath the lake.
Barbarian Training.name: Barbarian Training
Barbarian Training.start: Speak to Otto Godblessed in Otto's Grotto|his grotto at the lake atop Baxtorian Falls.
Barbarian Training.items: *Farming:n**Any seed that can be planted with a seed dibber (such as Allotment patch|allotment and Herb patch|herb seeds) and a free Farming patch for it (part 1)n**Any sapling and a free Farming patch for it (part 2)n**A spade (part 2)n**An axe or 200 coins (part 2, to clear a required patch if it is occupied)n*Firemaking:n**Any bow except Twisted bow|twisted, Cursed goblin bow|cursed, Dark bow|dark, Crystal bow|crystal, ogre bow|ogre, Rain bow|rain or the signed oak bow (part 1)n**Oak logs (can get some oak logs north of Otto's house, down a hill) (part 1)n**A tinderbox (part 2)n**An axe (part 2)n*Fishing:n**Some fishing bait or feathersn**A knifen*Smithing:n**Hammern**Two metal bars of a level you can smithn**Two logs corresponding to the type of metal bars you are using. bronze bar|Bronze, iron bar|iron, steel bar|steel, mithril bar|mithril, adamantite bar|adamantite, and runite bar|runite bars require logs|normal, Oak logs|oak, Willow logs|willow, Maple logs|maple, Yew logs|yew or magic logs, respectively.n*Herblore:n**A normal attack potion (2 doses)n**Roe (can be obtained during Barbarian Fishing)n**A knife for roe or caviar

Bear Your Soul.name: Bear Your Soul
Bear Your Soul.start: Speak to Aretha after reading a book called soul journey in the Arceuus Library.
Bear Your Soul.items: *Spaden*Dusty key or File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility 70/80 Agility (boostable) or Key master teleport

Below Ice Mountain.requirements: *File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points 16 Quest points (required to start)
Below Ice Mountain.desc: Willow, an energetic archaeologist (perhaps suspiciously so) is hunting for her next big discovery. She believes she has found the entrance to ancient underground ruins found to the west of Ice Mountain. There's a catch though - the entrance is sealed tight and she needs to re-unite her old crew to help her break in. Naturally, she has to stay close to the ruins in order to lay claim to the find, so it falls to you to bring her rag-tag group back together for one last caper and a final big pay-off.nnBurntof is an old dwarf with a penchant for demolition, Checkal is a well-built lifter of heavy things and Marley is a cunning thief with a knack for disarming traps.nnTogether, they have the talents it will take to gain entry to the secret ruins. But persuading them might not be easy. See, the gang aren't all too keen on working with Willow again, and her intentions might not be as honourable as she claims...
Below Ice Mountain.kills: Ancient Guardian (level 25) ('Note:' You can skip the fight with a pickaxe and File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining 10 Mining (boostable))
Below Ice Mountain.name: Below Ice Mountain
Below Ice Mountain.start: Willow (Below Ice Mountain)|Willow on the path south of Ice Mountain
Below Ice Mountain.items: *Cooked meat (can be obtained during the quest)n*Breadn*Knifen*Beer (can be obtained during the quest)n**Alternatively Asgarnian ale, Dwarven stout, or a Wizard's mind bomb

Beneath Cursed Sands.requirements: *Completion of the following quests:n**Contact!n***Prince Ali Rescuen***Icthlarin's Little Helpern****Gertrude's Catn*File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility 62 Agility (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting 55 Crafting (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Firemaking icon.png|link=Firemaking|alt=Firemaking 55 Firemaking (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)
Beneath Cursed Sands.desc: When Sophanem was beset by a series of plagues, the gates to the golden city of Menaphos quickly closed. The city has been locked down ever since, with no one allowed to leave or enter. However, rumours have escaped of strange happenings inside Menaphos and there are stories of citizens mysteriously disappearing. These odd happenings need to be investigated, but few are willing to do so. Maisa, a spy from Al Kharid, has grown tired of inaction. She is determined to solve this mystery herself, but she won't be able to do it alone... are you up for the challenge?
Beneath Cursed Sands.kills: *Head Menaphite Guard (level 174) without the use of protection prayersn*Two Scarab Mages (level 119)n*The Champion of Scabaras (level 379) n*Menaphite Akh (level 351)
Beneath Cursed Sands.name: Beneath Cursed Sands
Beneath Cursed Sands.start: Speak to Jamila at her stall in Sophanem.
Beneath Cursed Sands.items: *Coaln*Iron barn*Tinderbox (obtainable during quest)n*Spade (obtainable during quest) n*Any cooked or raw meat (fish will not work; raw yak meat will not work; purchasable from shop during quest)

Between a Rock....requirements: *Completion of the following quests:n**Dwarf Cannonn**Fishing Contestn*File:Defence icon.png|link=Defence|alt=Defence 30 Defence (boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining 40 Mining (boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing 50 Smithing (boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*The ability to defeat a level 75-125 enemy (depends on how much gold you mine)
Between a Rock....desc: Hidden away from the fearsome trolls and the roaming Fremennik, the dwarves delve deep beneath the mountains in search for the ore they need to support their home of Keldagrim. One dwarf in particular, however, has for years been trying to crack open a rock that seems to be impervious to any material that he's tried on it. Convinced that solving the riddle of the rock will lead him to unimaginable wealth, he has spent the later part of his life on just this lump of stone. Help him out, but take care you don't end up in a tight spot!
Between a Rock....name: Between a Rock...
Between a Rock....start: Speak to Dondakan the Dwarf at the Keldagrim south-west mine.
Between a Rock....items: *A pickaxen*4 gold bars (You will need an extra bar and telegrab if you want to keep a golden cannonball for after the quest)n*A hammern*An ammo mould (can be bought for 5 coins during the quest) or a double ammo mouldn*~830 coins (for cart and ferry)

Big Chompy Bird Hunting.requirements: *File:Fletching icon.png|link=Fletching|alt=Fletching 5 Fletching (boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Cooking icon.png|link=Cooking|alt=Cooking 30 Cooking (boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Ranged icon.png|link=Ranged|alt=Ranged 30 Ranged (not boostable) (not required to start)n*The ability to defend against level 64 wolves and level 53 ogres
Big Chompy Bird Hunting.desc: Rantz the Ogre needs to feed his demanding children, Fycie and Bugs, so he wants to go Big Chompy Bird hunting. Problem is, he's all fingers and thumbs when it comes to making ogre arrows.nnCould someone please give him a hand?
Big Chompy Bird Hunting.name: Big Chompy Bird Hunting
Big Chompy Bird Hunting.start: Speak to Rantz, far east of Feldip Hills.
Big Chompy Bird Hunting.items: *Any axe that you can use (Blessed axe does not work)n*Feathers (100 to be safe; coloured feathers from File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter Hunter work)n**Bringing 50 to buy 25 feathers from Fycie also worksn*Knife (or 10 to buy a knife and chisel from Bugs)n*Chisel (or 10 to buy a knife and chisel from Bugs) n*4 wolf bones (can be obtained from level 64 wolves during the quest or from level 14 wolves in the Stronghold of Security)n*Cabbage (can be obtained during the quest, Draynor cabbage will not work)n*Tomato (can be obtained during the quest)n*Onion (can be obtained during the quest)n*Potato (can be obtained during the quest)n*Equa leaves (can be obtained during the quest)n*Doogle leaves (can be obtained during the quest)

Biohazard.desc: This is the second part of an ongoing adventure. Help Elena discover the truth about the infamous Ardougne plague.nnSmuggle test samples across Ardougne to Elena's old mentor.
Biohazard.name: Biohazard
Biohazard.start: Talk to Elena in her house in East Ardougne.
Biohazard.items: *Bird feed (Can be obtained during the quest. Found in a cupboard in Jerico's house)n*Pigeon cage (Can be obtained during the quest. Found behind Jerico's house)n*Priest gown top and Priest gown bottom|bottom (can be obtained during the quest for a total of 12 coins from Asyff's Fancy Clothes Store)n*Gas mask (can be obtained for free from the cupboard in Edmond and Alrena's house in East Ardougne)

Black Knights' Fortress.requirements: *File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points 12 Quest points (required to start)n*The ability to evade level 33 Black Knights
Black Knights' Fortress.desc: The Black Knights are up to no good. You are hired by the white knights to spy on them and destroy their secret weapon.
Black Knights' Fortress.name: Black Knights' Fortress
Black Knights' Fortress.start: Speak to Sir Amik Varze on the 2nd floor[UK]3rd floor[US] of the White Knights' Castle's western tower in Falador.
Black Knights' Fortress.items: *Cabbage (can be obtained from the cabbage patch in Edgeville Monastery and Lumbridge Castle#Cellar|Lumbridge cellar. Cabbages obtained from Draynor Manor 'CANNOT' be used)n*Iron chainbody (can be purchased at Horvik's Armour Shop in Varrock and from Wayne's Chains - Chainmail Specialist|Wayne's Chains in Falador)n*Bronze med helm (can be purchased in the helmet shop in Barbarian Village, spawns by the backdoor of Draynor Manor)

Bone Voyage.requirements: *100 Kudosn*Completion of the following quest:n**The Dig Site
Bone Voyage.desc: Curator Haig Halen needs your help to finish the construction of a barge fit to take the Varrock museum crew to an unexplored landmass to the east. There have been many attempts to reach the island, but none were successful.nnThis quest will have you venturing across Gielinor, aiding the Varrock museum and making the success of the voyage a possibility.
Bone Voyage.name: Bone Voyage
Bone Voyage.start: Talk to Curator Haig Halen in the Varrock Museum.

Cabin Fever.requirements: *Completion of the following quests:n**Pirate's Treasuren**Rum Dealn***Zogre Flesh Eatersn****Big Chompy Bird Huntingn****Jungle Potionn*****Druidic Ritualn***Priest in Periln*File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility 42 Agility (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting 45 Crafting (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing 50 Smithing (not boostable) (required to start)n*File:Ranged icon.png|link=Ranged|alt=Ranged 40 Ranged (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)
Cabin Fever.desc: It's war on the high seas as Bill Teach tries to make the journey from Port Phasmatys to the pirate enclave of Mos Le'Harmless!nWith his crew heading for the hills, he's looking to recruit anyone eager to become a pirate to help him sink the enemy before he ends up swimming home. He's offering a lot more than a shilling to join his crew. Have you got what it takes to be a pirate?
Cabin Fever.name: Cabin Fever
Cabin Fever.start: Talk to Bill Teach at The Green Ghost inn in Port Phasmatys.
Cabin Fever.items: You don't need to bring any items yourself. However, make sure that you have at least '11' open inventory spaces for items you will obtain during the quest. A higher amount, like '14' open spaces, is recommended however.

Children of the Sun.desc: Children of the Sun begins on the familiar streets of Varrock, where a delegation from Varlamore has arrived to sign a treaty with the rulers of Misthalin. It’s a day for celebration, but something’s amiss… you’d better find out what’s going on!
Children of the Sun.name: Children of the Sun
Children of the Sun.start: Speak to Noah or Alina in Varrock square.

Client of Kourend.requirements: *Completion of the following quest:n**X Marks the Spot
Client of Kourend.desc: Will you help Veos handle a mysterious client?
Client of Kourend.name: Client of Kourend
Client of Kourend.start: Speak to Veos at Port Piscarilius.
Client of Kourend.items: *Feather (a Stripy feather|stripy or coloured feather can also be used, but a magic gold feather cannot)

Clock Tower.requirements: The ability to run past level 53 Ogres
Clock Tower.desc: Help the confused Brother Kojo find the missing cogs and fix his clock tower. Search the dungeon using brawn and brains to correctly place the four cogs.
Clock Tower.name: Clock Tower
Clock Tower.start: Talk to Brother Kojo in the Clock Tower (building)|Clock Tower south of East Ardougne.
Clock Tower.items: *Bucket of water (obtainable during quest) or Ice gloves or Smiths gloves (i)

Cold War.requirements: *File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter 10 Hunter (not boostable) (required to start)n*File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility 30 Agility (not boostable) (required to start)n*File:Crafting icon.png|link=Crafting|alt=Crafting 30 Crafting (not boostable) (required to start) n*File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore 14 Herblore (boostable) (not required to start)n*File:Mining icon.png|link=Mining|alt=Mining 40 Mining (boostable) (not required to start)n*The ability to defeat a level 68 Ogre and run past level 111 Blue dragons
Cold War.desc: The Wizards of the Yanille Watch Tower have been reporting increased ogre sightings recently. Use a wide variety of your skills to help the wizards recover their stolen power crystals and stop the advance of the ogre hordes!
Cold War.kills: *Gorad (level 68) (safespottable)n*Giant bat (level 27) (only if bat bones are needed)
Cold War.name: Watchtower
Cold War.start: Begin the quest by speaking to Watchtower Wizard north of Yanille in the Watchtower (building)|Watchtower. You must climb the trellis on the north side of the tower to get up there for the first time.
Cold War.items: *20 coinsn*Gold barn*Tinderboxn*Death rune (can be obtained during the quest)n*Pickaxen*Dragon bonesn*2 ropes (2nd rope can be obtained during the quest)n*Guam potion (unf) or guam leaf and a vial of water (vial of water can be obtained during quest)n*Any light source (can be obtained during the quest)n*Skavid map (can be obtained during the quest)n*Pestle and mortar (can be obtained during the quest)n*Bat bones (can be obtained during the quest, a knife or slash weapon is needed, grinding the bat bones before starting the quest to leave the pestle and mortar in the bank is also an option)n*Jangerberries (can be obtained during the quest)

Waterfall Quest.requirements: *The ability to withstand and evade attacks from level 86 Fire Giants and level 84 Moss Guardian without any equipment.
Waterfall Quest.desc: Investigate the death of elven leaders of old. Search for the elf King Baxtorian's tomb and discover the mysterious hidden treasure of the waterfall.
Waterfall Quest.name: Waterfall Quest
Waterfall Quest.start: Speak to Almera in her house north-east of Baxtorian Falls.
Waterfall Quest.ironman: File:Ultimate ironman chat badge.png You must briefly visit Glarial's Tomb which has Glarial's Tomb#Restricted items|significant item restrictions.
Waterfall Quest.items: *6 Air runesn*6 Earth runesn*6 Water runesn*Rope

What Lies Below.requirements: *Completion of the following quests:n**Rune Mysteriesn*File:Runecraft icon.png|link=Runecraft|alt=Runecraft 35 Runecraft (not boostable) (required to start)
What Lies Below.desc: A travelling trader has been stranded south of Varrock after his cart was attacked by local outlaws. He needs the help of a hero to recover his lost documents, but that's not all...nnThe Varrock Palace Secret Guard (VPSG) are on the trail of treacherous dealings with the Monks of Zamorak. Will you be able to help the VPSG and uncover what lies below?
What Lies Below.name: What Lies Below
What Lies Below.start: Talk to Rat Burgiss south of Varrock.
What Lies Below.items: *Empty bowln*15 chaos runesn*Access to the Chaos Altar (Chaos talisman or Chaos tiara|tiara, Catalytic tiara, or travelling through the Abyss or Temple of the Eye)

While Guthix Sleeps.requirements: *File:Quest point icon.png|link=Quest points|alt=Quest points 180 Quest points (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Thieving icon.png|link=Thieving|alt=Thieving 72 Thieving (not boostable) (required to start)n*File:Magic icon.png|link=Magic|alt=Magic 67 Magic (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Agility icon.png|link=Agility|alt=Agility 66 Agility (not boostable) (required to start)n*File:Farming icon.png|link=Farming|alt=Farming 65 Farming (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore 65 Herblore (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Hunter icon.png|link=Hunter|alt=Hunter 62 Hunter (not boostable) (required to start)n*Ability to enter the Warriors' Guild (the sum of your Attack and Strength must be at or above 130; OR File:Attack icon.png|link=Attack|alt=Attack 99 Attack, OR File:Strength icon.png|link=Strength|alt=Strength 99 Strength) (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*Completion of the following quests:n**Defender of Varrockn***Shield of Arravn***Temple of Ikovn***Below Ice Mountainn***Family Crestn***What Lies Belown***Romeo & Julietn***Demon Slayern***Garden of Tranquillityn****Creature of Fenkenstrainn*****Priest in Periln*****The Restless Ghostn**The Path of Glouphrien***The Eyes of Glouphrien****The Grand Treen***Waterfall Questn***Tree Gnome Villagen**Fight Arenan**Dream Mentorn***Eadgar's Rusen****Druidic Ritualn****Troll Strongholdn*****Death Plateaun***Lunar Diplomacyn****The Fremennik Trialsn****Lost Cityn****Rune Mysteriesn****Shilo Villagen*****Jungle Potionn**The Hand in the Sandn**Wanted!n***Recruitment Driven****Black Knights' Fortressn****Druidic Ritualn***The Lost Triben****Goblin Diplomacyn**Temple of the Eyen***Enter the Abyssn****Rune Mysteriesn**Tears of Guthixn**Nature Spiritn***Priest in Periln***The Restless Ghostn**A Tail of Two Catsn***Icthlarin's Little Helpern****Gertrude's Cat
While Guthix Sleeps.desc: This Grandmaster quest sees you continue the Mahjarrat storyline, hunting down one of the most powerful artefacts in existence while ensuring it doesn't fall into the wrong hands.nnThis artefact is known by many names – most recently, the Stone of Jas. It has shaped the course of Gielinor’s history, from the creation of the first Runes to the fall of Zaros. It was last seen at the devastating end of the God Wars, when Zamorak, in a fit of rage, used it to reduce the land of Forinthry to the Wilderness we know today.nnAngered by Zamorak’s actions, Guthix rose from his age-long slumber and banished the gods. He hid the Stone of Jas far underground, where it could never disturb the balance again...nnBut while Guthix sleeps, nefarious forces have been gathering; the Mahjarrat. Shaped by war and deadly ritual, their plans for the Stone can only lead to catastrophe.nnFacing off against the Mahjarrat is nothing new for dedicated adventurers – at every turn, they seem to grow in power and wage war against the people of Gielinor. In their last attempt, we saw them set out to tear Varrock apart with an undead army in Defender of Varrock. What are they plotting now?
While Guthix Sleeps.kills: *2 Assassin (While Guthix Sleeps)|Assassins (level 167)n*2 Mercenary axeman|Mercenary axemen (level 131)n*Mercenary mage (level 112)n*3 Elite Black Knights (level 138)n*Surok Magis (level 265)n*Balance Elemental (level 524)n*2 Tormented Demons (level 450)
While Guthix Sleeps.name: While Guthix Sleeps
While Guthix Sleeps.start: Speak to Ivy Sophista in Taverley.
While Guthix Sleeps.items: *Knifen*Ring of charos(a) or 500 coinsn*Seed dibber (only if Barbarian Farming Training has not been completed)n*Lantern lensn*Unpowered orbn*Bronze med helmn*Iron chainbodyn*Sapphire lanternn*Runes to cast the NPC Contact spell four times (8 air runes, 4 astral rune, 4 cosmic rune)n*Runes for any charge orb spell (30 runes of a chosen element and 3 cosmic runes)n*Equipment for two different attack stylesn'Obtainable during quest:'n*Mort myre fungusn*1 log of any type except redwood (you can obtain one using a bronze axe next to the Hunting Expert)n*Pink dye (for 20 coins)n*Snapdragon seedn*Papyrus and charcoaln*Restore potionn*One of each of the following runes: air rune|air, water rune|water, earth rune|earth, fire rune|fire, mind rune|mind, law rune|law, death rune|death

Witch's House.requirements: *The ability to defeat 4 monsters from level 19 to 53 without a break.
Witch's House.desc: A young boy who lives in Taverley has kicked his ball into the garden of a scary old lady.nnHe asks you to get it back for him. This proves more difficult than it first sounds.
Witch's House.name: Witch's House
Witch's House.start: Talk to the boy near the gate entrance of Taverley.
Witch's House.items: *Cheese (You may wish to bring several in case you mess up)n*Leather gloves (obtainable during the quest)

Witch's Potion.desc: Become one with your darker side. Tap into your hidden depths of magical potential by making a potion with the help of Hetty the Rimmington witch.
Witch's Potion.name: Witch's Potion
Witch's Potion.start: Talk to Hetty in her house in Rimmington, south of Falador and west of Port Sarim.
Witch's Potion.items: *Burnt meatn*Eye of newtn*Onionn*Rat's tail (only obtainable after starting the quest)

X Marks the Spot.desc: Veos has long been a lover of treasure hunts and his latest hunt has brought him to Lumbridge. However, not knowing the area well, Veos could use some help finding this treasure.
X Marks the Spot.name: X Marks the Spot
X Marks the Spot.start: Speak to Veos in The Sheared Ram in Lumbridge.

Zogre Flesh Eaters.requirements: *Completion of the following quests:n**Big Chompy Bird Huntingn**Jungle Potionn***Druidic Ritualn*You must be able to defeat a level 111 enemy.n*File:Smithing icon.png|link=Smithing|alt=Smithing 4 Smithing (boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Herblore icon.png|link=Herblore|alt=Herblore 8 Herblore (boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)n*File:Ranged icon.png|link=Ranged|alt=Ranged 30 Ranged (not boostable) (unknownCategory:Unknown start requirement status)
Zogre Flesh Eaters.desc: Run for your lives...the zombie ogres are here for your flesh! An ogre ceremonial dance area, used to communicate with ancient ogrish ancestors, has been overrun with diseased undead ogres.nnHow could something like this have happened? And what sort of rewards could an enterprising adventurer gain from exploring the tombs of such a place?
Zogre Flesh Eaters.name: Zogre Flesh Eaters
Zogre Flesh Eaters.start: Speak to Grish in Jiggig, just south of Castle Wars.
Zogre Flesh Eaters.items: *5 free inventory spaces are needed to receive items near the start of the questn*A comp ogre bow (not needed if using Crumble Undead in final battle) 'or':n**Wolf bonesn**Achey logs (obtainable during quest)n**Knife (obtainable during quest)n**Axe of your Woodcutting leveln**Bow stringn*Brutal arrows (not needed if using Crumble Undead in final battle) 'or':n**Achey logsn**Knife (obtainable during quest)n**Nails of your Smithing leveln**Hammern**Feathers (4 per 1 brutal arrow)
